name: imds-fetcher
description: Cloud instance metadata service enumeration tool. Auto-detects and queries AWS, GCP, and Azure metadata endpoints to extract credentials, tokens, and configuration data.

metadata.ai_description: imds-fetcher is a cloud reconnaissance tool that queries instance metadata services (IMDS) across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Use it when you have access to a cloud-hosted instance or container to discover IAM credentials, access tokens, SSH keys, and configuration data that may be exposed through metadata endpoints. It auto-detects the cloud provider and enumerates all accessible metadata paths, including IMDSv1 and IMDSv2 for AWS.
use_cases: Extracting IAM credentials from AWS IMDS (169.254.169.254)
Retrieving GCP service account tokens from metadata
Discovering SSH keys injected via cloud-init
Collecting cloud configuration data for lateral movement
limitations: Requires shell access on a cloud-hosted instance or container
Some cloud providers disable IMDS by default
May trigger cloud security monitoring alerts

parsing.extraction_hint: Extract discovered IAM credentials, access tokens, service account keys, SSH keys, cloud provider identity, and any exposed configuration data from metadata endpoints

examples.description: Auto-detect cloud provider and enumerate metadata
